---
title: "NN De Miguel"
author: "Yun Tsing"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(h2o)
library(caret)

df <- read_csv('../data/final_data.csv')
```

```{r}
# Initialise h2o
tryCatch({
  h2o.init(nthreads = 1, max_mem_size = "4G")
}, error = function(e) {
  message("H2O is already running.")
})
```

```{r}
predict_alpha_nn_h2o <- function(df, target = "alpha_ann") {
  
  start_time <- Sys.time()
  df$caldt <- lubridate::as_date(df$caldt)
  features <- setdiff(names(df), c("crsp_fundno", "caldt", "alpha_ann"))
  
  all_years <- lubridate::year(df$caldt)
  pred_year <- max(all_years)
  
  # Data splitting
  train_full <- df[all_years < pred_year, ]
  test       <- df[all_years == pred_year, ]
  
  train_years_list <- sort(unique(lubridate::year(train_full$caldt)))
  cutoff           <- train_years_list[floor(length(train_years_list) * 0.7)]
  
  tune_train_df <- train_full[lubridate::year(train_full$caldt) <= cutoff, ]
  tune_val_df   <- train_full[lubridate::year(train_full$caldt) >  cutoff, ]
  
  train_h2o      <- h2o::as.h2o(tune_train_df)
  val_h2o        <- h2o::as.h2o(tune_val_df)
  test_h2o       <- h2o::as.h2o(test)
  full_train_h2o <- h2o::as.h2o(train_full) 
  
  # Grid search
  hyper_params <- list(
    hidden = list(c(32), c(32, 16), c(32, 16, 8)), 
    l1 = c(1e-4, 1e-3),
    l2 = c(1e-4, 1e-3),
    input_dropout_ratio = c(0.0, 0.05, 0.1), 
    hidden_dropout_ratios = list(
    # Options for 1-layer (32)
    c(0.2), c(0.4), c(0.5),
    # Options for 2-layers (32, 16)
    c(0.2, 0.2), c(0.3, 0.2), c(0.5, 0.5),
    # Options for 3-layers (32, 16, 8)
    c(0.2, 0.2, 0.2), c(0.3, 0.2, 0.1), c(0.4, 0.4, 0.4)
  )
  )
  
  grid <- h2o::h2o.grid(
    algorithm = "deeplearning",
    grid_id = paste0("nn_grid_", pred_year),
    x = features,
    y = target,
    training_frame = train_h2o,
    validation_frame = val_h2o,       
    seed = 4101,
    reproducible = TRUE,
    hyper_params = hyper_params,
    activation = "TanhWithDropout",  
    epochs = 50,          
    stopping_rounds = 10,
    adaptive_rate = TRUE,
    stopping_metric = "MSE"
  
  )
  
  # Identify best model
  grid_results <- h2o::h2o.getGrid(grid@grid_id, sort_by = "mse", decreasing = FALSE)
  best_model <- h2o::h2o.getModel(grid_results@model_ids[[1]])
  cat("\n==============================================\n")
  cat(sprintf("Best Hyperparameters for Year %d:\n", pred_year))
  cat(sprintf("  - Hidden Layers:  %s\n", paste(best_model@parameters$hidden, collapse = ", ")))
  cat(sprintf("  - L1 Reg:         %e\n", best_model@parameters$l1))
  cat(sprintf("  - L2 Reg:         %e\n", best_model@parameters$l2))
  cat(sprintf("  - Input Dropout:  %.2f\n", best_model@parameters$input_dropout_ratio))
  cat(sprintf("  - Hidden Dropout:  %.2f\n", best_model@parameters$hidden_dropout_ratios))
  cat(sprintf("  - MSE: %.6f\n", as.numeric(grid_results@summary_table$mse[1])))
  cat("==============================================\n")
  
  seeds <- c(4101, 4102, 4103, 4104, 4105)
  ensemble_preds <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(test), ncol = length(seeds))
  
  for(i in 1:length(seeds)) {
    cat(sprintf("\nSeed %d for Year %d \n", i, pred_year))
    
    m_final <- h2o::h2o.deeplearning(
      x = features, y = target,
      training_frame = full_train_h2o,
      hidden = best_model@parameters$hidden, 
      l1 = best_model@parameters$l1,
      l2 = best_model@parameters$l2,
      input_dropout_ratio = best_model@parameters$input_dropout_ratio,
      hidden_dropout_ratios = best_model@parameters$hidden_dropout_ratios, 
      epochs = 50,
      activation = "TanhWithDropout",
      adaptive_rate = TRUE,
      seed = seeds[i],
      reproducible = TRUE
    )
    
    p <- h2o::h2o.predict(m_final, test_h2o)
    ensemble_preds[, i] <- as.numeric(as.vector(p$predict))
    h2o::h2o.rm(m_final) 
  }
  
  res_preds <- data.frame(
    evaluation_year = pred_year,
    crsp_fundno = test$crsp_fundno,
    predicted_alpha = rowMeans(ensemble_preds) 
  )
  
  
  # Cleanup H2O memory
  h2o::h2o.rm(train_h2o); h2o::h2o.rm(val_h2o); h2o::h2o.rm(test_h2o); h2o::h2o.rm(full_train_h2o)
  duration <- round(difftime(Sys.time(), start_time, units = "mins"), 2)
  message(paste("Year", pred_year, "complete in", duration, "minutes"))
  
  return(res_preds)
}
```

```{r}
result = predict_alpha_nn_h2o(df)
```



```{r}
df_for_shap_analysis = read_csv('../data/df_for_shap_analysis.csv')

final_train_df <- df_for_shap_analysis %>% filter(lubridate::year(caldt) <= 2024)
feature_names  <- setdiff(names(final_train_df), c("crsp_fundno", "caldt", "alpha_ann", "year"))

h2o.removeAll() 
final_h2o_data <- as.h2o(final_train_df, destination_frame = "FINAL_NN_DATA")

final_h2o_model <- h2o.deeplearning(
  x = feature_names,
  y = "alpha_ann",
  training_frame = "FINAL_NN_DATA",
  model_id = "BEST_NN_MODEL",
  hidden              = c(32, 16),           
  l1                  = 1e-3,                  
  l2                  = 1e-4,                  
  input_dropout_ratio = 0.1,
  hidden_dropout_ratios = c(0.3, 0.2),
  activation     = "TanhWithDropout",          
  epochs         = 50,                       
  adaptive_rate  = TRUE,                       
  seed           = 4101,                       
  reproducible   = TRUE                        
)

set.seed(4101)
all_rows_count <- nrow(h2o.getFrame("FINAL_NN_DATA"))

# Generate the indices
shap_rows_sorted       <- sort(sample(1:all_rows_count, 1500))
background_rows_sorted <- sort(sample(1:all_rows_count, 100))

h2o.assign(h2o.getFrame("FINAL_NN_DATA")[shap_rows_sorted, ], "LOCKED_SHAP_SAMPLE")
h2o.assign(h2o.getFrame("FINAL_NN_DATA")[background_rows_sorted, ], "LOCKED_BACK_SAMPLE")


shap_contributions_matrix <- h2o.predict_contributions(
  object = final_h2o_model,
  newdata = h2o.getFrame("LOCKED_SHAP_SAMPLE"),
  background_frame = h2o.getFrame("LOCKED_BACK_SAMPLE")
)

shap_df <- as.data.frame(shap_contributions_matrix)

# Generate plot
imp_df_nn <- shap_df %>%
  select(-BiasTerm) %>% 
  summarise(across(everything(), ~mean(abs(.)))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "feature", values_to = "value") %>%
  arrange(desc(value)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)

nn_shap_ranking_plot <- ggplot(imp_df_nn, 
       aes(y = reorder(feature, value), x = value, fill = value)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(value, 5)), 
            nudge_x = max(imp_df_nn$value) * 0.05, 
            size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "firebrick", high = "dodgerblue4") +
  labs(title = "Neural Network SHAP Ranking") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, .15)))

print(nn_shap_ranking_plot)
ggsave("../figures/nn_shap_plot.png", plot = nn_shap_ranking_plot, width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)


```
